prompt: A realistic archery range with two targets side by side. On the left target, arrows are scattered widely across the board, showing high randomness. On the right target, arrows are tightly grouped together but far from the center, showing a consistent but incorrect aim. The environment is natural and realistic, no text, no symbols, cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
tradition_approach: Practitioners refine accuracy through repeated practice, learning consistency and control in aiming.
